name: Char-Broiled Rib Eyes
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the lemon sauce by melting butter and mixing in the juice of one lemon, the peel of half a lemon, and a dash of hot sauce.
2. Wrap mushrooms, peppers, onions, tomatoes, and garlic in foil to create a packet for grilling.
3. Place the steaks on the grill and baste with lemon sauce, turning frequently.
4. When nearly done, move the steaks to the coolest part of the grill surface.
5. On the hottest part of the fire, place the steaks about 2 inches from the coals for:
- 10 minutes for rare (total cooking time: 10 minutes)
- 15 minutes for medium (total cooking time: 15 minutes)
- 20 minutes for well done (total cooking time: 20 minutes)
6. Baste with lemon sauce and turn the steaks as needed.
7. Transfer everything to a platter and top with grilled vegetables and remaining lemon sauce before serving.
